title: Luscious Thai New Potatoes Curry
description: Savory, velvety Thai curry that feels like a hangover cure, featuring tender new potatoes in a low-sodium coconut broth.
instructions: Wash and slice the new potatoes into bite-sized pieces.
Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat and sauté the garlic, shallot, and ginger until fragrant.
Add the red curry paste and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Pour in the coconut milk and water, then bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Add the sliced potatoes and low-sodium fish sauce, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
Stir in the lime juice, kaffir lime leaves, and fresh basil, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Taste the curry and adjust seasoning if needed, keeping the salt low.
Serve the curry hot over steamed rice or enjoy on its own, garnishing with extra basil or crushed peanuts if desired.
